3084000.name: Wonder Loop Village
3084000.description:
Let’s head to the back of the warehouse if there’s nothing else! If you encounter any anomalies, retreat and take shelter in the warehouse. Our goal is to escape from this mysteriously looping village!

Wonder Loop Village is a spot-the-difference game influenced by Exit 8, among others.

【Video Streaming Guidelines】

Streaming is allowed for both individuals and companies without requiring permission.
Monetization is permitted only through features provided by video streaming platforms.
Including the game’s name in the video title or adding a link to the Steam page in the video description would be appreciated.
However, I assume no responsibility for any damages resulting from streaming this game. Please note that these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
